short: The greatest English astrologer of the 17th century, master of horary astrology.
body: Author of 'Christian Astrology' (1647), Lilly went down in history for his astonishing predictive ability, notably his forecast of the Great Fire of London in 1666. He brought horary astrology to its highest level of perfection. His work is today the foundation of the revival of traditional astrology in the West, for he set out his methods with a clarity rare for his time.
